Welcome Home

Evangelical Christian
Church – Bacoor

"Ang Dios ay Pag-ibig." — God is Love

Our Pastors

We are blessed to be led by dedicated pastors who serve with passion and commitment to our church community. They bring together years of experience, spiritual wisdom, and a genuine love for our congregation.

Our pastoral team is devoted to guiding us through God's Word, providing spiritual counsel, and fostering a welcoming community where all are encouraged to grow in faith.

Gather With Us

A church family for every voice, step, and song

From our singers and dancers to the musicians on piano, guitar, bass and drums — every ministry serves together each Wednesday prayer meeting and Sunday service.

A Community For You

Choir Ministry

We lift our voices together in worship — rehearsing, learning, and leading the church into His presence.

Stay In The Loop

Announcements

The latest updates from the Choir Ministry.

Join Us

Sing with us

No formal training required — just a willing heart to worship. We hold open rehearsals where anyone interested can sit in, learn the parts, and grow.

📅
Rehearsals
Fridays, 6:00 PM
📍
Where
Main Sanctuary, ECC Bacoor
🎶
Who
All voice parts welcome

Who We Are

Evangelical Christian Church – Bacoor

ECC Bacoor is a community built on prayer, worship, and fellowship. Every week, our singers, dancers, and musicians lead us into His presence — at our Wednesday prayer meetings and Sunday services.

We believe in welcoming every member to grow, serve, and be part of God's family.

"Ang Dios ay Pag-ibig." — 1 John 4:8
